title: Advantez Artificial Palm Leaves, Fake Jungle Leaves, Monstera Leaves for Tropical Theme Party Hawaiian Luau Safari Beach Party Decorations, Safari Theme Gift Wrap (12Pcs)
features: Party & Home Decorations: Perfect for Tropical Hawaiian, Luau Parties, Safari Party, Beach Theme, Wedding, Birthday, Jungle Theme, etc. These faux palm leaves will create an authentic tropical island atmosphere

Wide Application: Our tropical leaves are suitable for living room, dining table, bedroom, bathroom, work office, gallery, wall, public places, and it also can be used as safari theme gift wrap, rainforest decorations, etc
High Quality Material: Our palm leaves are made of high soft fabric material, non-toxic and eco-friendly, washable, durable and reusable, So it can be used for a long time
Natural Foliage Design: Look like real tropical leaves are a special eye-catcher at any party, they will give you a natural feeling both on visual and touch
description: Product Description Tropical Plant Safari Leaves, Faux Monstera Leaves, Fake Leaves for Hawaii, Luau, Beach, Birthday, Tropical Themed Parties, Gift Wrap Decorations Specification: Material: Fabric Color: Green Size: About 20*17cm Quantity: Package includes 12pcs artificial palm leaves FEATURES: -Lightweight and easy to be stored -Can be washed, durable and reusable -Glossy, Lifelike and look more realistic -Perfect for Hawaiian party, Luau party, Tropical theme party, Safari party, beach theme party, jungle theme party, wedding, birthday, Wrapping
